description: Merkle root relayed from Ethereum to Polygon with age of 7200 seconds (2 hours), exceeding the maxRootAge threshold of 3600 seconds (1 hour). Simulates a relay delay where the root became stale before verification. A conformant verifier MUST reject this.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: rootAge=7200s > maxRootAge=3600s. Same proof as cv_03 but with a stale relay timestamp simulating bridge congestion or sequencer delay.
